text:
Now I see the full picture. When user rejects:

1. The SDK calls the progress callback with `error` → `toast.error` fires (line 1542)
2. The SDK also throws from `await result` → outer `catch` fires `toast.error` again (line 1578)
3. Sometimes `currentStep?.error` also fires (line 1549)

Also the `createClient` at module level with empty `chains: []` is wrong — it creates a client with no chains, then the `useEffect` creates another one with chains but the first one (with no chains) may persist as the active client. Let me check how `createClient` works:
